title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
Spacious 2‑Bedroom Flat | Purpose‑Built Mansion Block | No Onward Chain | Prime Marylebone Location

Located within the elegant and well‑regarded Oxford & Cambridge Mansions, this bright and well‑configured two‑bedroom flat offers an excellent opportunity to acquire a centrally located London home with no onward chain. Set within a handsome purpose-built brick mansion block, the property benefits from generous room proportions, high ceilings, and the timeless architectural charm associated with these sought-after London residences.
Perfectly suited to owner‑occupiers, pied‑à‑terre buyers, or investors, this flat provides a superb blank canvas to personalise in one of Marylebone’s most convenient and desirable locations.

Entrance Hallway
A welcoming hallway provides access to all principal rooms, offering excellent circulation space and two large storage cupboards.

Living and Dining Room
A wonderfully bright and generously proportioned reception room, bathed in natural light thanks to its elevated position and windows. The original wooden flooring adds warmth and character, while the room’s impressive ceiling height enhances the sense of openness and elegance typical of a classic mansion block. With views that open up towards the sky, the space feels exceptionally private and tranquil. Offering ample room for both seating and dining areas, it is an inviting and versatile setting, perfect for everyday living, working, or entertaining in a beautifully airy environment.

Kitchen
A practical, self-contained kitchen space offering storage, worktop space and integrated cooking appliances.

Bedroom One
A spacious double bedroom with generous proportions and scope for freestanding storage.

Bedroom Two
A second well-sized double bedroom ideal for guests, sharers, a home office, or investment use.

Bathroom
Comprising bath with shower over and hand basin, with a separate WC, for added convenience.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
Tucked away in the heart of Fulham, this stylish two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment offers modern living with a spacious open-plan kitchen and dining area stretching over 22 feet. The layout is perfectly designed for both entertaining and relaxing, with Bedroom 1 boasting an en-suite for added comfort and privacy. Bedroom 2 makes a great guest room, home office, or child’s bedroom. With a total floor area of 631 sq ft, this home makes smart use of space without compromising on comfort.

Set within Ariana Apartments on Lillie Road, you’re just a short stroll from West Brompton and Fulham Broadway stations, giving you access to the District Line and London Overground — ideal for an easy commute or nights out in the West End. Enjoy the buzz of nearby cafés, boutique shops, and parks, with the River Thames and vibrant North End Road Market just minutes away. Whether you're a first-time buyer or a savvy investor, this is London living made simple.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
DISCOUNT AVAILABLE FOR CASH BUYERS

Accommodation: Two double bedrooms, a spacious open-plan reception room/kitchen, and a modern shower room. (Approximate floor area of main rooms: 44.0 sqm).

Condition: Features a recently renovated living area, shower room, and bedrooms, offering a high-quality, move-in-ready finish.

Prime Location: Highly convenient for the amenities of Edgware Road, walking distance to the world-class shopping of Oxford Street and green open spaces of Hyde Park.

Transport: Superbly connected with close proximity to Marble Arch Underground Station (Central Line), along with Edgware Road, Paddington, and Marylebone stations nearby.

An ideal Central London home or investment, with security and amenities on the doorstep.

title: 2 bedroom ground floor maisonette
description:
Positioned on one of the most prestigious roads in London—originally built for The Great Exhibition of 1850—45A Elsynge Road offers a rare blend of heritage charm and contemporary style. This 743 sq ft, split-level basement flat is presented in immaculate condition, making it an exceptional opportunity for buyers seeking refined living in a prime location.
The accommodation includes two well-proportioned bedrooms, smartly arranged across split levels to maximise both space and privacy. At the heart of the home lies a private south-facing garden stretching approximately 25 feet—an ideal retreat for morning coffees, weekend lounging, or entertaining guests.
Perfectly located near the vibrant St John's Hill and the open green space of Wandsworth Common, the flat offers convenient access to boutique shops, independent cafés, and excellent transport links.
Key Highlights:
•	Prestigious address with historic significance
•	Stylish split-level layout across 743 sq ft
•	Private 25' south-facing garden
•	Immaculate turnkey condition
•	Moments from St John’s Hill and Wandsworth Common

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
SHARE OF FREEHOLD

A beautifully presented two-bedroom split-level apartment ideally situated in the heart of London’s sought-after SW8 area. This stylish and spacious home offers over 940 sq. ft. of versatile accommodation, featuring a perfect blend of period character and modern design.

The property comprises two well-proportioned bedrooms, a contemporary bathroom, and a bright and modern kitchen/breakfast room with direct access to a private roof terrace — ideal for entertaining or relaxing with city views. The upper floor features a large and inviting reception room, offering flexible space for living and dining.

Located within walking distance of the Clapham Common, Battersea Power Station, and Queenstown Road, this property benefits from excellent transport links into Central London. With its elegant interiors, private outdoor space, and fantastic location a stone throw from Battersea Park, this home is perfect for professionals, couples, or small families seeking modern London living in a vibrant and well-connected area.

The property benefits from a 50/50 share of freehold with the ground floor flat (101)

title: 2 bedroom apartment
description:
Spacious 2-Bedroom Third-Floor Apartment – Westminster Court, 40 Melville Place, London, N1 8ND

Situated in the heart of Islington, this well-presented two-bedroom third-floor apartment offers bright and spacious living in a highly sought-after location. The property is in great condition throughout and benefits from plenty of storage space.

Upon entering, you are welcomed by a generous hallway leading to a spacious lounge/dining room, which provides access to both a well-appointed kitchen and a private balcony, perfect for relaxing or entertaining. The apartment also boasts a large double bedroom, a second well-proportioned double bedroom, and a modern bathroom complete with a bath, over-bath shower, sink, and toilet.

Ideally located next to Essex Road Train Station, the property offers excellent transport links with direct connections into the city. It is also within easy reach of Angel, Old Street, and Shoreditch, offering a fantastic array of cafés, restaurants, and shops.

An ideal home or investment opportunity – early viewing recommended!

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
Chain free property 

Beautifully converted two bedroom apartment on first floor, set within a striking Grade II listed church in the heart of Islington, just moments from excellent transport links and vibrant local amenities. This exceptional home combines contemporary comfort with period character, featuring soaring arched windows, exposed brickwork, new electric storage heaters, megaflow hot water heater and flowing living space that creates an elegant sense of light and grandeur.

The property offers a bright semi-open plan reception and kitchen, ideal for both relaxing and entertaining. The principal bedroom benefits from a dressing room, alongside a second well-proportioned bedroom, a family bathroom and separate entrance hallway with storage cupboard. Further highlights include soundproofed floors, high quality carpets, ample inbuilt storage and secure entry system.

Perfectly located for city living, the apartment is within easy reach of Highbury & Islington, Caledonian Road, and Caledonian Road & Barnsbury stations, providing excellent connections across London. Kings Cross and St Pancras International are also close by for national and international travel. The area is renowned for its eclectic mix of shops, cafés, bars, green spaces and restaurants - making this a fantastic opportunity to own a unique home in one of London’s most desirable neighbourhoods.

The potential to convert the dressing room into bedroom three and space for ensuite in bedroom one.

To book a viewing instantly just visit our website or download our award-winning App.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
Top Flat - 1st & 2nd floor maisonette.

**SHARE OF FREEHOLD* *NO ONWARD CHAIN** 


A sizeable two double bedroom, split level maisonette occupying the top two floors of an attractive period property, boasting a large roof terrace to the rear, enviably located on a sought after road within Camden NW1.

This bright and spacious flat is within a few minutes walk of several pubs, eight minutes walk from a large Sainsbury's. You are close to the action but not too close for comfort. Apart from the delights of Camden's day and night vibe itself, you are only a ten minute walk from Camden Town tube (Northern Line), the same for Granary Square and Kings Cross (six other tube lines plus the Eurostar and trains to Gatwick Airport), or just five minutes from Camden Road (the Mildmay Overground line) for trains East to Stratford or West to Richmond. Dozens of bus routes including night buses pass through Camden (the 274 goes along Agar Grove), or you could take a stroll (or a boat) along the canal. This is position A1, hence all the maps. Location, location, location is everything when you ae choosing where to live!

The best feature of this two-floor maisonette is its outdoor space (the roof terrace) that comes without the security risks that can come with basement garden flats in this inner-city area. Grow tomatoes out there, enjoy barbecues and birdfeeders, it's a smoking area if guests want one, or just enjoy the fresh breeze. It feels like it doubles the size of the living room.

Staircase to landing: kitchen, toilet, and living room. Second staircase to two double bedrooms and the bathroom. 

Virtual tour available, To book your viewing instantly online 24/7 please visit the Purplebricks website - purplebricks.co.uk

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
** Guide price £600,000 - £650,000 **

Elegant and Stylish Two-Bedroom Apartment – Ready to View

Step into this beautifully designed, sophisticated two-bedroom apartment, offering a perfect blend of elegance and modern living.

Upon entering, you are greeted by a spacious and welcoming entrance hall that seamlessly leads into a stunning open-plan kitchen and living area. This inviting space is designed for both comfort and style, featuring sleek finishes and ample natural light. From here, you’ll find access to a charming winter garden—an ideal spot for relaxation, enjoying your morning coffee, or unwinding after a long day.

The apartment boasts two generously sized double bedrooms, both designed to provide a serene and comfortable retreat. The primary bedroom benefits from a stylish en-suite bathroom, while the second bedroom is served by a beautifully appointed family bathroom, offering both functionality and contemporary design.

Throughout the property, you'll find high-quality timber flooring and elegant spotlights that enhance the modern aesthetic, creating a warm and sophisticated ambiance.

Location

Situated in a prime location, this development offers effortless access to the vibrant dining, shopping, and entertainment options along Kingsland High Street. Additionally, popular East London destinations such as London Fields, Broadway Market, and Church Street are just a short stroll away. With Dalston Junction and Dalston Kingsland stations only moments from your doorstep, as well as excellent bus connections, commuting to Shoreditch, Islington, and the City is both quick and convenient.
Residents of Dalston Square enjoy exclusive access to a 24-hour concierge service, a well-equipped private gym, and a beautifully designed communal rooftop terrace.

This exceptional home is a must-see—schedule a viewing today!

title: 2 bedroom ground floor flat
description:
Stunning two bedroom period conversion garden flat, superbly situated close to fantastic transport links and a vibrant array of amenities. The property has been beautifully maintained and appointed, retaining a wealth of character appeal with high ceilings.  Flowing living space with stylish interiors and quality finish provides the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this fantastic residential location - perfect for homeowner or investor alike.   Features include a beautiful open plan reception/kitchen/diner, modern shower room, gas central heating, sash windows, high ceilings and attractive wood flooring.

Accommodation comprises entrance hall with inbuilt storage, leading into the bright and spacious, open plan reception/kitchen with front aspect bay and ample space for both relaxing and dining. The kitchen area comprises a modern range of matching white fronted wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset farmhouse ceramic sink unit, induction hob with overhead extractor and electric oven, and integrated fridge and freezer. There are two well sized bedrooms overlooking the shared garden - the principal bedroom spacious enough for a king size bed and the smaller bedroom either a double or excellent as an office with sofa bed for guests.  A modern shower room with white three piece suite and elegant tiling completes the accommodation.  

The property also benefits from its own shed nestled at the end of the communal garden, offering additional storage.

To book a viewing instantly just visit our website or download our award-winning App.

title: 2 bedroom apartment
description:
Well presented two bedroom, two bathroom, top floor apartment with private balcony and secure underground parking, conveniently located in a sought after modern development moments from Cricklewood station and a hive of local amenities. The property offers bright and spacious, well planned accommodation with modern interiors throughout, including a generous open plan reception/kitchen and two bath/shower rooms (one en-suite). Further features include double glazing, recessed lighting, inbuilt storage, quality floor coverings, neutral decor, and long lease.  The development further benefits from residents' lift and  CCTV security.  

Accommodation comprises entrance hall with inbuilt storage, leading into the reception/kitchen with direct access onto the private balcony and ample space for both relaxing and dining. The kitchen area comprises a modern range of matching wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset sink unit, induction hob with overhead extractor, wall mounted electric oven, and further integrated appliances. There are two well sized bedrooms - one with inbuilt wardrobes and en-suite shower room - plus a bathroom with modern suite and elegant tiling.  

The property is conveniently located within easy access of Cricklewood station, as well as numerous regular bus routes offers excellent cross-London connections.  The area is well served by a variety of local shops and amenities, as well as open spaces.  

To book a viewing instantly just visit our website or download our award-winning App.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
*** Join us for an exclusive Open House on Saturday 23rd of August between 11:00am - 12:00 to explore this fantastic property in person. By appointment only. ***

Beautifully presented two bedroom basement flat with delightful large private garden and share of the freehold, superbly situated in an attractive period terrace close to excellent transport links, fashionable amenities, and the Regents Canal.  The property offers bright and spacious accommodation with modern interiors throughout - ideal for homeowner or investor alike in this fantastic vibrant central location.  Features include a generous reception room, separate well equipped kitchen, modern bathroom, ample inbuilt storage, and gas central heating.  

Accommodation comprises entrance hall with access to useful store cupboard, leading into the reception room with front aspect bay, ample space for relaxing, entertaining and dining, and opening through to the kitchen.  The kitchen comprises a modern range of matching wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset sink unit, gas hob with overhead extractor and electric oven below, and further space for appliances.  An inner hallway leads to a family bathroom and two well sized bedrooms, each with inbuilt storage and double doors leading out to the garden.  

The property is very conveniently located within easy access of stations at Warwick Avenue, Maida Vale, Westbourne Park and Royal Oak, all providing excellent underground links into Central London and the City, as well as an array of local bus routes.  There are a variety of shops, bars, restaurants and amenities within a short distance, as well as the nearby Regent's Canal and Little Venice district with riverside cafes and bars.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
A beautifully bright and spacious two double bedroom, two bathroom garden flat moments from West Hampstead’s cafés and three rail connections.

The property has been beautifully maintained and appointed by the current owner, offering immaculate accommodation with stylish interiors  and neutral finish throughout - the perfect blend of comfort and convenience for a modern lifestyle.  Features include an impressive open plan reception/kitchen, modern bathroom, principal en-suite, gas central heating, double glazing, quality floor coverings, and inbuilt storage.    

Accommodation comprises entrance hall with inbuilt storage, leading into the open plan reception/kitchen, flooded with natural light from overhead skylight windows, with direct access onto the delightful private garden and ample space for both relaxing and dining.  The kitchen area comprises a modern range of matching white fronted wall and base units with work surfaces and breakfast bar area, incorporating inset sink unit, induction hob with overhead extractor, electric oven, and further space for appliances.  There are two double bedrooms, with en-suite shower to the principal bedroom.  A stylish family bathroom with white three piece suite and elegant tiling completes the accommodation.  

The property is very conveniently located within easy access of West Hampstead (with Thameslink, Jubilee line and overground services), Kilburn and Brondesbury stations, as well as numerous regular bus routes providing excellent cross-London links.  The area is also well served by fashionable shops, bars, cafes and restaurants and excellent local schools.  

To book a viewing instantly just visit our website or download our award-winning App.

title: 2 bedroom terraced house
description:
A well-presented two-bedroom terraced house with an additional office/study, ideally located in a popular cul-de-sac within easy walking distance of Cricklewood Broadway, excellent transport links, and a wide range of local amenities.

The property offers bright and spacious accommodation throughout, including a welcoming reception room and a well-equipped, modern eat-in kitchen. Further benefits include ample built-in storage, gas central heating, double glazing, and a private rear garden.

The accommodation comprises an entrance hallway with stairs to the first floor, leading through to a rear-aspect reception room offering generous space for both relaxation and entertaining, with direct access to the garden. The separate kitchen features a contemporary range of matching wall and base units with work surfaces, an inset sink, and space for appliances. To the first floor are two well-proportioned double bedrooms, an additional study/store room, and a family bathroom fitted with a white three-piece suite.

The property is conveniently positioned within a short walk of both Cricklewood and Brent Cross West stations, providing excellent connections into Central London and the City. Numerous bus routes serve the area, alongside superb road links via the A1, A41, and M1. Cricklewood offers a variety of shops, cafés, pubs, and restaurants, with Brent Cross Shopping Centre also within easy reach. The area is further enhanced by good local schools, leisure facilities including a nearby gym, and attractive open spaces such as Gladstone Park, located just a few hundred yards away.

Offered in ready-to-move-into condition, this property represents an excellent opportunity for first-time buyers and investors alike.

title: 2 bedroom maisonette
description:
Well presented two bedroom top floor period conversion with no onward chain, ideally situated moments from Willesden Green station and local amenities.  The property offers light and spacious accommodation with modern interiors, period appeal and neutral finish - ideal for a modern lifestyle.  Features include a generous reception room, separate well equipped kitchen, stylish shower room, gas central heating, double glazing, and quality floor coverings.  

Accommodation comprises entrance with stairs rising to the upper floor, leading into the reception room with attractive front aspect bay and ample space for relaxing, entertaining and dining.  The separate kitchen comprises a modern range of matching wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset sink unit, electric hob with overhead extractor and electric oven below, and further space for appliances.  There are two well sized bedrooms,  plus a stylish shower room with modern suite.  

The property is very conveniently located within a short walk of Willesden Green station, as well as numerous regular bus routes, providing excellent fast and frequent links into Central London and the City.  The area is well served by an array of shops, bars, restaurants and amenities, as well as good local schools and pleasant open spaces including nearby Gladstone Park.

title: 2 bedroom flat
description:
Stunning two bedroom, two bathroom, third floor apartment with private balcony, superbly situated in a sought-after modern gated development close to excellent transport links and a vibrant array of amenities.  The property has been beautifully maintained and appointed by the current owners, offering light and spacious accommodation with stylish interiors, modern elegance and luxury finish - the perfect blend of comfort and convenience for a modern lifestyle.  Features include an impressive open-plan reception/kitchen/diner, modern bathroom and principal en-suite, ample inbuilt storage, quality flooring, gas central heating, double glazing, secure entry, and long lease.  The property further enjoys access to well maintained communal gardens, a secure bike shed, as well as remaining NHBC warranty.  

Accommodation comprises entrance hall with in-built storage and utility cupboard, leading into the open-plan reception/kitchen/diner with direct access onto the delightful private south-facing balcony and ample space for both relaxing and dining.  The kitchen area comprises a modern range of matching high gloss wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset sink unit, induction hob with overhead extractor and electric oven below, and further integrated appliances.  There are two well-sized double bedrooms, with en-suite shower to the principal bedroom, plus a stylish family bathroom with white three piece suite and elegant tiling.

The property is conveniently located within access of stations at Acton Central, Shepherds Bush Market, Acton Main Line, Stamford Brook, and Turnham Green, all offering excellent cross-London connections, with numerous regular bus routes also linking the surrounding area.  There are a variety of shops and amenities within easy reach, as well as attractive open spaces.

title: 2 bedroom semi-detached house
description:
Beautifully presented two bedroom Victorian railway cottage with charming private garden and roof terrace, enviably situated in the heart of the Old Oak and Park Royal regeneration zone, moments from existing and planned transport links and amenities.  The property offers bright and spacious accommodation with modern interiors and neutral finish throughout - ideal for new homeowner or investor alike in this fantastic central location.  Features include an impressive open plan ground floor living space, coal/wood fireplace, with well equipped kitchen, upstairs bathroom, gas central heating, double glazing, inbuilt storage and quality floor coverings.  

Accommodation comprises entrance leading into the double length open plan reception/dining room with dual aspect, and doors spilling out onto the patio garden.  The separate kitchen comprises a modern range of matching wall and base units with work surfaces incorporating inset sink unit, gas hob with overhead extractor, electric oven, and further space for appliances.  To the first floor, there are two bedrooms, plus a family bathroom with modern white three piece suite.  

The property is very conveniently located within a short walk of Willesden Junction station, as well as numerous regular bus routes, providing excellent fast and frequent links into Central London and the City.  The upcoming Old Oak Common Station, part of the regeneration programme for the area, will additionally provide high-speed connections across the UK. The area is currently well served by an array of shops, bars, restaurants and amenities, as well as good local schools and pleasant open spaces.  

To book a viewing instantly just visit our website or download our award-winning App.
